features.description: A fresh agent can start, understand state, choose one unblocked feature, and leave a clean handoff without prior conversation context.
acceptance_steps: Read agent instructions, progress, feature ledger, and recent git history.
Run the canonical initialization and smoke path.
Create a valid current contract for one feature.
Complete a dry-run evaluator and progress handoff.
verification_evidence: Independent Level 1 evaluation recorded in agent-state/evaluation.json.
Git Bash and PowerShell initialization and smoke scripts passed.
Scripts resolve repository root from their own paths, validate required files and JSON, and report app scaffold checks as pending F002.
Negative missing-file and invalid-JSON checks used temporary copied fixtures and produced actionable failures.
No application scaffolding or product implementation was added.

features.description: A clean checkout has complete licensing, tooling, CI, security checks, and a reproducible monorepo baseline.
acceptance_steps: Verify approved licence and notice files.
Run formatting, linting, tests, secret and dependency checks.
Verify CI rejects a controlled failure and passes after removal.
verification_evidence: Independent Level 1 evaluation recorded in agent-state/evaluation.json for commit b7f51436a6dfd88b8e3e4b46faad4e9b68374101.
Required AGPL-3.0 licence and notice files exist, are non-empty, and match docs/LICENSING.md.
scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit passed all checks: Ruff lint/format, pytest (20 passed), Prettier, ESLint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, and npm audit.
Individual ruff, pytest, Prettier, and ESLint commands passed independently.
Controlled unused-import probe failed with F401, was removed, and tests\ ruff check passed afterward.
Secret baseline findings are false positives (git commit SHA and environment-variable names) and use forward-slash paths.
CI is read-only, uses no secrets, and covers Python, Node, secret scan, and dependency audit jobs.
scripts/check.ps1 resolved the repository root and passed when invoked by absolute path from C:\.
.venv and node_modules are ignored and untracked; no application scaffolding was added.

features.description: The frontend, API, worker, scheduler, and PostgreSQL start through the canonical scripts and remain healthy after restart.
acceptance_steps: Start the full stack through the canonical script.
Verify frontend, API, worker, scheduler, migrations, and database connectivity.
Restart and rerun the smoke workflow.
Stop and clean up through documented commands.
verification_evidence: Fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluation of the merged main branch (commit 9f43e07) recorded disposition=passed with 0 blocking failures across all 11 criteria in agent-state/evaluation.json (increment full-epic-close-out).

Canonical stack-up brought all five services healthy (postgres, api, worker, scheduler, web) and scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 passed all 11 checks: API liveness/readiness, app_meta + worker (job_queue/service_heartbeat) migrations, worker/scheduler healthy, queue processed >=1 job to done, fresh heartbeats, web healthy, web serves the SPA (GET / 200 with #root), and web proxies GET /api/health (200 status=ok).
Restart resilience confirmed: stack-down (keep volumes) -> stack-up -> stack-smoke passed all 11 checks again; clean stop via scripts/stack-down.ps1 left no running services.

Negative seam proof (real integration, not mocked): with the api service stopped, GET / stayed 200 while GET /api/health returned 504 through the nginx proxy, then recovered to 200 after api restarted.

Regression green on main: scripts/test.ps1 (42 Python passed + 4 web tests + web build) and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit (ruff, format, pytest, prettier, eslint, secret scan, pip-audit, npm audit = 0 vulnerabilities) both passed.
Delivered across three merged slices: PR #5 (6049e7f, API + PostgreSQL + Alembic), PR #6 (bd41c98, worker + scheduler PostgreSQL job queue), PR #7 (9f43e07, React web frontend served by nginx).

features.description: Typed configuration, the catalogue model, immutable evidence history, and explainable Z0 classification enforce all safety rules.
acceptance_steps: Validate good and bad YAML with actionable errors.
Apply, rollback, and reapply database migrations.
Verify immutable offer versions and evidence provenance.
Run the Z0 truth table including unknown and contradictory conditions.

features.description: Safe official-source adapters produce reproducible candidates, evidence, changes, health, and conflicts without publishing directly.
acceptance_steps: Run contract tests for every source type.
Verify official-domain allowlists, network blocking, limits, timeouts, and malformed-data handling.
Verify unchanged, changed, stale, and contradictory fixtures.
Confirm community sources cannot become verified evidence.

features.description: Cloudflare works end to end from official discovery through verification, history, review, API, and public provider experience.
acceptance_steps: Run Cloudflare scans and deterministic quota extraction.
Verify repeat scans do not create false changes.
Exercise changed and contradictory evidence paths.
Browse category states, offers, evidence, confidence, history, completeness, and freshness.

features.description: Users can search, compare, inspect evidence, and receive deterministic evidence-backed Z0 architecture recommendations.
acceptance_steps: Test catalogue search, filters, comparison, evidence, and history.
Disable LLM providers and run the adviser evaluation corpus.
Verify quota math, Z0 safety, portability, lock-in, and exit-plan explanations.
Verify impossible workloads follow reduction, recalculation, and self-hosting order.

features.description: Model routing, browser ZIP generation, and private administration operate under consent, safety, validation, and authorization controls.
acceptance_steps: Test model consent, failure, quota exhaustion, and deterministic fallback.
Verify generated ZIPs are validated, secret-free, and not persisted server-side.
Verify only the allowlisted GitHub administrator can use admin functions.
Exercise negative security and audit scenarios.

features.description: GitHub, AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Vercel, and Oracle are each investigated across all fourteen categories with official evidence and fixtures.
acceptance_steps: Run official-source adapters and fixtures for each provider.
Verify every provider-category pair has an explicit state.
Exercise changed, stale, withdrawn, and contradictory cases.
Verify community repositories remain non-authoritative.

features.description: A documented public Z0 deployment operates at zero cost and version 0.1.0 passes every mandatory MVP criterion.
acceptance_steps: Complete real no-payment onboarding for every public component.
Verify public workflows, quota usage, headroom, estimated bill, and mirror deployment.
Run all functional, data, security, accessibility, portability, and architecture checks.
Tag version 0.1.0 only after independent release approval.
